---
mode: ask
description: Start a new article from scratch
---
I want to start a new article. The topic is: [DESCRIBE TOPIC HERE]

Please help me:
1. Brainstorm 3–5 compelling angles for this topic targeting senior .NET/cloud engineers.
2. Identify what would make a reader say "I've been doing this wrong."
3. Suggest whether this should be a single article or a short series (2–3 parts).
4. Propose an article slug in kebab-case (no date prefix).

Then create the following file structure:
```
content/{slug}/brainstorm.md   ← your analysis and angle recommendations
content/{slug}/outline.md      ← skeleton outline with section headers
```

Follow the blog writing instructions in `.github/instructions/blog-writing.instructions.md`.
